headline: Former energy secretary Rick Perry says AI revolution hinges on 2 limitations
summary: The former Texas governor believes the AI race will be won by energy-rich states and companies that can navigate a tightening industrial supply chain.

raw.headline: Former energy secretary Rick Perry says AI revolution hinges on 2 limitations
raw.summary: The former Texas governor believes the AI race will be won by energy-rich states and companies that can navigate a tightening industrial supply chain.

headline: Elon Musk's xAI wins permit to build power plant in Mississippi despite pollution concerns
summary: Mississippi regulators authorized xAI to build a power plant with 41 natural gas-burning turbines in Southaven to power its nearby data centers.

raw.headline: Elon Musk's xAI wins permit to build power plant in Mississippi despite pollution concerns
raw.summary: Mississippi regulators authorized xAI to build a power plant with 41 natural gas-burning turbines in Southaven to power its nearby data centers.
